name: provider-pool
description: EXTENDS byok with graceful multi-credential failover + error-based cooldown. Pure fallbackRules.ts verdict table + providerPool.pickCredentials/markCredResult over the existing modelCreds rows; a ≤3-attempt loop in callForUser's BYOK branch. codex/claude OAuth creds stay single-cred (not pooled).
notes: EXTENDS byok — does NOT own modelCreds, only ADDS additive/optional pool fields (label, priority, status, cooldownUntil, backoffLevel, lastErrorCode) via a schema spread into the existing table (no new index; reuses by_user_provider + by_ws_provider). Consumer must: (1) add the pool fields to the modelCreds defineTable; (2) hand-integrate the ≤3-attempt loop into callForUser's BYOK 'else' generateText branch — the openai-codex/anthropic-oauth branches MUST stay single-cred (OAuth subscriptions can't fail over). fallbackRules.classifyProviderError is pure (no `ai`/node import) and self-checks via _selfCheck(). CredStatusBadge is optional UI: className-only styling ('pool-badge pool-<status>'), consumer owns the CSS.
